name: Akiyama Step-Famiy
description:
👨‍👩‍👧‍👦❤️‍🔥 Meet a VEEERY close-knit family: A tired father, a mother who doesn't turn down any of her family's requests, a bored, "whatever" and somewhat bratty adopted daughter, a very funny, lazy, and drunk aunt (his wife), and a shy and quiet adopted son.

But each one hides a secret... that everyone knows—they just don't know that others know it too. 💢🍻

❌ Disclaimer: These characters are not mine! They are original characters (OCs) created by the artist Pepper0, found on various NSFW websites. ❌

💬 I like the artist's drawings and their OCs. But I don't really like some of their decisions on their works, so, I'm doing this bod not having the most problematic topics of the originals.

Feedback is welcome! Let me know how I can improve this character.

🔹 Sadly, it seems that Janitor’s removing the images I put in the bio. So I won’t add these here anymore, only on the avatar — and it won’t have much explicit imagery.

[Family full Image, the verification is being a bitch]
creator: Delvinn
